source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Side A has air at 200 kPa, 300 K, and side B has air at 1.0 MPa, 1000 K. The piston is now unlocked so that it is free to move, and it conducts heat so that the air comes to a uniform temperature T_A = T_B. Find the final P.
